phase_1_core.scope: broker client, LLM adapters + fallback, Telegram bot with tenant lock, strategy interview, scan/propose, two-tap confirm with live re-verification
verified: py_compile clean on all src modules
single place_order call site (two-tap confirm handler only)
webhook idempotency via processed_updates(update_id) + atomic shown->confirming claim
tenant lock rejects non-owner before any processing
fallback JSON path retries exactly once then raises SchemaValidationError

phase_2_views.scope: portfolio view, sector analysis, market intel/premarket brief, gated web UI
verified: web routes render read-only templates only; gated by one-time /weblink magic link + HttpOnly session cookie
sector momentum computed from broker historicals, no new dependency
brief labeled as LLM interpretation, budget-checked

phase_3_news.scope: Finnhub integration, news_cache table, 1h TTL on-demand refresh
verified: cache-first with 1h TTL; refetch only on user /news request
finnhub daily cap tracked under api_calls service='finnhub', separate from LLM cap
